# One-Day Meal Plan for Boxing Athlete

## 1. DAILY CALORIE CALCULATION

**Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR):**
- Using Mifflin-St Jeor: ~1,750 kcal/day
- Activity Factor (intense boxing training): ×1.6 = **2,800 kcal/day**

**For 3kg loss in 2 weeks:**
- Target: 500 kcal deficit/day = **2,300 kcal/day**

---

## 2. MACRONUTRIENT BREAKDOWN

| Macro | Amount | Calories |
|-------|--------|----------|
| **Protein** | 150g (2.0g/kg) | 600 kcal |
| **Carbs** | 260g (3.5g/kg) | 1,040 kcal |
| **Fat** | 64g (0.85g/kg) | 576 kcal |
| **TOTAL** | — | **2,300 kcal** |

*High protein maintains muscle during deficit; carbs fuel boxing performance*

---

## 3. MEAL TIMING (Around Boxing Training)

Assuming **10 AM boxing session (90 min)**:

| Meal | Time | Purpose |
|------|------|---------|
| Breakfast | 7:00 AM | Pre-workout fuel |
| Pre-workout snack | 9:00 AM | Quick energy |
| Post-workout | 11:30 AM | Recovery |
| Lunch | 2:00 PM | Main meal |
| Snack | 5:00 PM | Energy boost |
| Dinner | 7:30 PM | Recovery + satiety |

---

## 4 & 5. COMPLETE MEAL PLAN

### **BREAKFAST** (7:00 AM) — 550 kcal
- **Sweet potato** (200g cooked): 150 kcal | 27g carbs
- **Chicken breast** (120g grilled): 190 kcal | 35g protein
- **Olive oil** (1 tbsp for cooking): 120 kcal | 14g fat
- **Banana** (1 medium): 90 kcal | 23g carbs
- **Almonds** (20g): 120 kcal | 4g protein, 4g fat

**Totals:** 550 kcal | 35g protein | 50g carbs | 18g fat

---

### **PRE-WORKOUT SNACK** (9:00 AM) — 200 kcal
- **White rice cakes** (2 cakes, 40g): 150 kcal | 33g carbs
- **Almond butter** (1 tbsp, 16g): 95 kcal | 3g protein, 8g fat
- **Honey** (1 tsp): 20 kcal | 5g carbs

**Totals:** 200 kcal | 3g protein | 38g carbs | 8g fat

---

### **POST-WORKOUT MEAL** (11:30 AM) — 450 kcal
- **Ground turkey** (150g lean, cooked): 240 kcal | 40g protein
- **White rice** (150g cooked): 195 kcal | 43g carbs
- **Carrots** (100g raw): 41 kcal | 10g carbs
- **Sea salt & pepper**: 0 kcal

**Totals:** 450 kcal | 40g protein | 53g carbs | 2g fat

---

### **LUNCH** (2:00 PM) — 520 kcal
- **Salmon fillet** (140g baked): 280 kcal | 35g protein, 18g fat
- **Sweet potato** (150g cooked): 115 kcal | 26g carbs
- **Broccoli** (150g steamed): 50 kcal | 5g protein, 10g carbs

output:
# One-Day Muscle-Building Meal Plan

## 1. DAILY CALORIE CALCULATION

**Using Mifflin-St Jeor Formula + Activity Factor:**
- BMR = 1,800 calories
- Activity multiplier (weightlifting 5-6x/week) = 1.55
- **Daily calories needed: ~2,800 calories**

---

## 2. MACRONUTRIENT BREAKDOWN

| Macro | Amount | Calories |
|-------|--------|----------|
| **Protein** | 170g (1g per lb bodyweight) | 680 cal |
| **Carbs** | 350g | 1,400 cal |
| **Fat** | 93g | 840 cal |

---

## 3. MEAL TIMING (Assuming 2 PM Workout)

- **Breakfast** (7 AM) - Pre-workout fuel
- **Mid-Morning Snack** (10 AM) - Energy boost
- **Pre-Workout** (1 PM) - Quick carbs
- **Post-Workout** (3:30 PM) - Protein + carbs
- **Dinner** (7 PM) - Protein + balanced macros
- **Evening Snack** (9:30 PM) - Casein protein

---

## 4 & 5. COMPLETE MEAL PLAN WITH PORTIONS

### **BREAKFAST (7 AM)** | 650 cal | 35g P | 75g C | 18g F

- Oatmeal: **80g** dry (cooked)
- Whole eggs: **3 large** (scrambled)
- Banana: **1 medium** (150g)
- Almond butter: **1 tbsp** (16g)
- Black coffee: unlimited

---

### **MID-MORNING SNACK (10 AM)** | 300 cal | 25g P | 35g C | 5g F

- Greek yogurt: **200g** (plain, 0%)
- Granola: **40g**
- Honey: **1 tbsp** (20g)
- Berries: **80g** (blueberries)

---

### **PRE-WORKOUT (1 PM)** | 250 cal | 10g P | 55g C | 2g F

- White rice cakes: **50g** (2 cakes)
- Honey: **1.5 tbsp** (30g)
- Banana: **1 small** (100g)

---

### **POST-WORKOUT (3:30 PM)** | 450 cal | 40g P | 50g C | 8g F

- Grilled chicken breast: **200g**
- White rice: **150g** cooked
- Olive oil: **1 tbsp** (15g)
- Broccoli: **150g** (steamed)

---

### **DINNER (7 PM)** | 700 cal | 45g P | 80g C | 15g F

- Lean ground beef (93/7): **250g** (cooked)
- Sweet potato: **300g** (baked)
- Mixed salad: **150g**
- Olive oil dressing: **1 tbsp** (15g)

---

### **EVENING SNACK (9:30 PM)** | 450 cal | 40g P | 15g C | 15g F

- Cottage cheese: **250g** (2%)
- Almonds: **30g**
- Casein protein powder: **30g** (mixed in)

---

## 6. BUDGET OPTIMIZATION

**Cost-saving swaps:**
- Chicken thighs instead of breast (cheaper, similar protein)
- Eggs instead of protein powder (more economical)
- Frozen vegetables instead of fresh
- Bulk rice and oats
- Store-brand Greek yogurt

**Estimated daily cost: $12-15 USD**

---

## DAILY TOTALS

| Nutrient | Target | Actual |
|----------|--------|--------|
| **Calories** | 2,800 | 2,

- Activity Multiplier: 1.7 (intense training)
- **Daily Needs: ~3,000 kcal**

---

| Macro | % | Grams | Calories |

| **Protein** | 15% | 112g | 450 kcal |
